unstranslatedContent.title: Display the default language when the content is untranslated
unstranslatedContent.only: Only for languages supported by the website
unstranslatedContent.all: All languages, even those not supported by the website

availability.title: Availability
availability.placeholder: Active, Hidden in live, Required, Inactive

inactive.title: Inactive
inactive.description: Content is not editable and not visible in live

inactiveInLive.title: Inactive in live
inactiveInLive.description: Content is editable but not visible in live

active.title: Active
active.description: Content is editable and visible in live

required.title: Required
required.description: Mandatory language to publish any other languages (editable and visible in live)

default.title: Set as default language
default.error: This language is already the default language.

error.mandatory: This language is mandatory and cannot be deleted.
error.default: This language is the default language and cannot be deleted.
error.activeInEdit: This language is active in edit mode and cannot be deleted.
error.language: This language is used by {{ count }} content and cannot be deleted.
